Checkout Form Validation - Invalid Input Data › Whitespace-only input in name fields handling
Checkout Form Edge Cases - Long and Extreme Inputs › Very long text input (50+ characters) in first and last name fields
Checkout Form Edge Cases - Long and Extreme Inputs › Maximum length input testing (255+ characters)
Checkout Form Edge Cases - Long and Extreme Inputs › International characters (Unicode) in name fields
Checkout Form Edge Cases - Long and Extreme Inputs › Leading and trailing spaces in form fields
Navigation and Cart Persistence Tests › Cancel button on checkout step one returns to cart with items intact
Navigation and Cart Persistence Tests › Cancel button on checkout step two returns to cart with items intact
Navigation and Cart Persistence Tests › Back/Continue Shopping button from cart returns to products page
Navigation and Cart Persistence Tests › Sequential navigation through complete checkout workflow
Navigation and Cart Persistence Tests › Back Home from completion page resets cart
Order Overview and Price Calculation Tests › Verify correct price calculations with 2 items
Order Overview and Price Calculation Tests › Verify correct price calculations with multiple items (4+)
Order Overview and Price Calculation Tests › Verify order overview displays correct payment and shipping info
Order Overview and Price Calculation Tests › Order overview displays complete item details
UI Elements and Form Visibility Tests › Checkout step one form fields are properly labeled
UI Elements and Form Visibility Tests › Error messages display correctly and are dismissible
UI Elements and Form Visibility Tests › Buttons are functional and properly labeled
UI Elements and Form Visibility Tests › Cart item cards display all required information
UI Elements and Form Visibility Tests › Order overview table structure is clear and readable
Cart Review and Product Details Tests › Cart displays correct item quantities and totals
Cart Review and Product Details Tests › Remove button removes items from cart individually
Cart Review and Product Details Tests › Cart displays product descriptions and links
Cart Review and Product Details Tests › Cart navigation options are available and functional
Negative Scenarios - Form Submission Edge Cases › Cannot proceed with form containing only whitespace
Negative Scenarios - Form Submission Edge Cases › Tab order and form navigation using keyboard
Negative Scenarios - Form Submission Edge Cases › Form field input constraints and max length behavior

Order Completion and Confirmation Tests › Back Home button clears cart and returns to products page
Order Completion and Confirmation Tests › Order confirmation URL is correct
Checkout Happy Path - Successful Order Completion › Complete successful checkout with 2 items
Checkout Happy Path - Successful Order Completion › Complete checkout with multiple items (4+)
Checkout Happy Path - Successful Order Completion › Successful order and back home navigation clears cart
